question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not explicitly list the chapters (e.g., Chapter 1, Chapter 2). Instead, it describes the scope of the work. It would be better to explicitly mention the structural divisions of the thesis.

question: Description
feedback: The text provides a good description of the research content, covering the theoretical investigation of the PE format, the analysis of specific methods (Slack Space, string replacement, DLL injection), and the practical implementation part.

question: Structure
feedback: The general flow of the research (theory -> analysis of methods -> practical implementation/experiment) is clear and easy to follow, even though the formal chapter structure is missing.
